description: The governed overlay is entirely additive. No existing files are modified. Rollback consists of removing the overlay directories and new doc files.

rollback_steps.action: Verify no existing files were modified

rollback_steps.command: rm -f docs/architecture/RECONSTRUCTION_INTENT_FREEZE.md docs/architecture/TRUST_MODEL_FREEZE.md docs/architecture/SYSTEM_BOUNDARY_FREEZE.md docs/architecture/HIVE215_*.md docs/architecture/SURFACE_MAPPING.md docs/contracts/FASTBRAIN_TO_HIVE215.md docs/contracts/HIVE215_TO_FASTBRAIN.md docs/deploy/DEPLOYMENT_CANONICAL_PATH.md docs/deploy/ENV_CONTRACT.md docs/deploy/HEALTHCHECKS.md
python -m py_compile backend/main.py && python -m py_compile backend/livekit_worker.py

risk_assessment: LOW -- Overlay is purely additive. No existing file modifications. All overlay files are in new directories or new files within existing directories.
